title: urena lobata subsp. lobata
intro: Urena lobata subsp. lobata, also known as Burnweed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Urena lobata subsp. lobata include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
